problem: The CLI package version (currently 1.3.3) needs to be bumped so that a merge to main triggers the two-stage GitHub Actions pipeline (auto-tag → publish) to auto-deploy to NPMJS.

files.why: Primary version source of truth (line 3: "version": "1.3.3"). The auto-tag workflow reads this field to decide whether to create a new git tag. The publish workflow validates the tag matches this version before publishing.
Contains version in two locations (lines 3 and 9). Must stay in sync with package.json.

Stage 1 of deploy pipeline. Triggers on push to main. Reads version from package.json, checks if v{version} tag exists on remote, creates and pushes tag if it does not. Uses RELEASE_TOKEN secret for git push auth.

Stage 2 of deploy pipeline. Triggers on v* tag push. Builds (npm ci + prepare), runs tests, validates tag version matches package.json version, packs tarball, validates tarball contents, publishes to npm with provenance.
Runtime version reader. Reads version from package.json dynamically at runtime (no hardcoded version string). Confirms version field is single-source-of-truth.
TypeScript build configuration. Build outputs to dist/. Source in src/.

facts: Current version is 1.3.3 in both package.json (line 3) and package-lock.json (lines 3, 9).
Deployment pipeline is two-stage: (1) auto-tag.yml on main push creates v{version} tag if absent, (2) publish.yml on v* tag push publishes to npm.
auto-tag.yml uses RELEASE_TOKEN secret (checkout token) for tag push permission; its GitHub permissions block only has contents:read.
publish.yml requires id-token:write (for npm provenance OIDC) and contents:read.
publish.yml validates tag version matches package.json version before publishing (lines 32-38).
publish.yml validates tarball contains dist/index.js, package.json, skill-content/SKILL.md, and no test files (lines 43-57).
publish.yml uses Node 24 specifically because npm 11.x supports Trusted Publishing OIDC.
Version is read at runtime from package.json by src/update/version.ts — no hardcoded version strings in source code.
Quality gates: typecheck (tsc --noEmit), test (tsc && node --test dist/**/*.test.js), build (tsc).
No ORM or database dependencies. No migration concerns.
No runtime dependencies — only devDependencies (@types/node, typescript).
Previous ticket (cmp5p01tn) successfully completed the same auto-tag + publish pipeline setup with version 1.3.3.
unknowns: What semver increment is intended (patch 1.3.4, minor 1.4.0, or major 2.0.0)? Ticket does not specify.
Whether the current 1.3.3 was already successfully published to npm or if this bump is needed because the prior publish failed.
Whether RELEASE_TOKEN secret is currently configured and valid in the GitHub repo settings.
